<!-- Generated by migeval bootstrap — review before committing -->

# PatternFly 5 → 6 Migration — Domain Knowledge

This document provides comprehensive domain knowledge for evaluating PatternFly 5 (PF5) to PatternFly 6 (PF6) migrations.

## Package Version Requirements

All `@patternfly/*` packages must be upgraded to v6. Key packages:

| Package | Required Version |
|---|---|
| `@patternfly/react-core` | ^6 |
| `@patternfly/patternfly` | ^6 |
| `@patternfly/react-icons` | ^6 |
| `@patternfly/react-table` | ^6 |
| `@patternfly/react-charts` | ^6 |
| `@patternfly/react-component-groups` | ^6 |
| `@patternfly/react-drag-drop` | ^6 |

**React compatibility:** PF6 supports React 17, 18, and 19.

## Component Removals (No Direct Replacement in react-core)

These components were removed from `@patternfly/react-core`. They had been deprecated in PF5 and are no longer available — not even via `@patternfly/react-core/deprecated`:

| Removed Component | Replacement Strategy |
|---|---|
| `ApplicationLauncher` | Rebuild using `Dropdown` + `MenuToggle` |
| `ContextSelector` | Rebuild using `Dropdown` or `Select` + `MenuToggle` |
| `OptionsMenu` | Rebuild using `Dropdown` or `Select` + `MenuToggle` |
| `PageHeader` | Use `Masthead` component |
| `PageNavigation` | Removed entirely; restructure page layout |
| `KebabToggle` | Use `MenuToggle` with `variant="plain"` + `EllipsisVIcon` |
| Old `Select` | Use the new `Select` (promoted from "next") |
| Old `Dropdown` | Use the new `Dropdown` (promoted from "next") |

## Component Renames

| PF5 Name | PF6 Name | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `Text` | `Content` | Use `<Content component="p">` |
| `TextContent` | `Content` | Simplified content wrapper |
| `TextList` | `Content` + `<ul>`/`<ol>` | Use semantic HTML inside `<Content>` |
| `TextListItem` | `Content` + `<li>` | Use semantic HTML inside `<Content>` |
| `Chip` | `Label` | Chip merged into Label |
| `ChipGroup` | `LabelGroup` | ChipGroup merged into LabelGroup |
| `Tile` | `Card` | Tile functionality merged into Card |
| `TableComposable` | `Table` | The old data-driven `Table` was removed entirely |
| `MastheadBrand` (as logo container) | `MastheadLogo` | `MastheadBrand` is now a wrapper around `MastheadLogo` |

## Removed Subcomponents

| Removed | Replacement |
|---|---|
| `EmptyStateHeader` | Use `titleText` prop on `EmptyState` |
| `EmptyStateIcon` | Use `icon` prop on `EmptyState` |

## Prop Changes

### Accordion
- `AccordionContent`: removed `isHidden` prop (visibility controlled by parent `AccordionItem`'s `isExpanded`)
- `AccordionToggle`: `isExpanded` moved to parent `AccordionItem`

### Avatar
- `border` prop removed → use `isBordered`

### Banner
- `variant` prop removed → use `color` or `status` props

### Button
- `isActive` renamed to `isClicked`
- Icons must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children
- `isDisabled` now sets `disabled` attribute (not `aria-disabled`); `aria-disabled` only renders when `true`

### Card
- Removed: `isSelectableRaised`, `isDisabledRaised`, `hasSelectableInput`, `selectableInputAriaLabel`, `onSelectableInputChange`, `isFlat`, `isRounded`

### Checkbox / Radio
- `isLabelBeforeButton` replaced with `labelPosition="start"`

### Drawer
- `DrawerHead`: removed `hasNoPadding`
- `colorVariant`: `"light-200"` → `"secondary"`, `"no-background"` removed from `DrawerContent`
- `DrawerPanelBody` no longer renders inside `DrawerHead` automatically

### Form
- `FormGroup`: `labelIcon` renamed to `labelHelp`
- Typo fix: `FormFiledGroupHeaderTitleTextObject` → `FormFieldGroupHeaderTitleTextObject`

### HelperText
- `HelperTextItem`: removed `hasIcon` and `isDynamic`

### Label
- `isOverflowLabel` replaced with `variant="overflow"`
- Color renames: `"cyan"` → `"teal"`, `"gold"` → `"yellow"`

### Masthead
- `backgroundColor` prop removed (theming no longer handled React-side)

### Navigation
- `variant="tertiary"` → `variant="horizontal-subnav"`
- `theme` prop removed
- `NavItem`: `hasNavLinkWrapper` removed; pass icons to `icon` prop

### Page
- `header` prop renamed to `masthead`
- `isTertiaryNavGrouped` → `isHorizontalSubnavGrouped`
- `isTertiaryNavWidthLimited` → `isHorizontalSubnavWidthLimited`
- `tertiaryNav` → `horizontalSubnav`
- `PageSection`: `type="nav"` removed; `variant` accepts only `"default"` or `"secondary"`
- `PageSidebar`: `theme` prop removed

### Switch
- `labelOff` prop removed

### Tabs
- `isSecondary` renamed to `isSubtab`
- `variant="light300"` → `variant="secondary"`

### Toolbar
- Removed: `usePageInsets` (Toolbar), `alignSelf` (ToolbarContent), `widths` (ToolbarItem), `alignment` (ToolbarToggleGroup)
- Chip → Label prop renames:
  - `customChipGroupContent` → `customLabelGroupContent`
  - `chips` → `labels`
  - `deleteChipGroup` → `deleteLabelGroup`
  - `deleteChip` → `deleteLabel`
  - `chipGroupCollapsedText` → `labelGroupCollapsedText`
  - `chipGroupExpandedText` → `labelGroupExpandedText`
- Interface renames: `ToolbarChipGroupContentProps` → `ToolbarLabelGroupContentProps`, `ToolbarChipGroup` → `ToolbarLabelGroup`, `ToolbarChip` → `ToolbarLabel`

### Other
- `DataListAction`: removed `isPlainButtonAction`
- `JumpLinksItem`: `href` now required
- `MenuToggle`: icons should be passed to `icon` prop, not as children
- `SimpleFileUpload`: use `browseButtonAriaDescribedby` instead of `aria-describedby`
- `DragDrop`: deprecated → use `DragDropSort` from `@patternfly/react-drag-drop`

## CSS Class & Variable Changes

### Prefix Changes
- CSS class prefix: `pf-v5-` → `pf-v6-`
- CSS variable prefix: `--pf-v5-` → `--pf-v6-`
- All custom overrides using old prefixes must be updated

### Design Token System
PF6 introduces a new design token system. Key changes:
- Old React tokens: `global_Color_*`, `global_BackgroundColor_*`, `global_FontSize_*`
- New React tokens: `t_global_color_*`, `t_global_font_size_*`, etc.
- Temporary tokens with `--pf-t--temp--dev--tbd` indicate values needing manual replacement
- Color tokens often require manual migration as mappings aren't always 1:1

### Logical Properties
- CSS properties using `Left`/`Right` replaced with `InsetInlineStart`/`InsetInlineEnd`
- Example: `--pf-v6-c-slider__step--Left` → `--pf-v6-c-slider__step--InsetInlineStart`

### Breakpoint Changes
PF6 uses rem units instead of pixels for breakpoints:
- sm: 576px → 36rem
- md: 768px → 48rem
- lg: 992px → 62rem
- xl: 1200px → 75rem
- 2xl: 1450px → 90.625rem

## Import Path Changes

### Charts
```typescript
// PF5
import { Chart, ChartArea } from '@patternfly/react-charts';
// PF6
import { Chart, ChartArea } from '@patternfly/react-charts/victory';
```
Victory is now an optional peer dependency.

### Deprecated Components
Importing from `@patternfly/react-core/deprecated` indicates incomplete migration. These components should be replaced with their modern equivalents.

### DragDrop
```typescript
// PF5
import { DragDrop } from '@patternfly/react-core';
// PF6
import { DragDropSort } from '@patternfly/react-drag-drop';
```

## Component Group Changes (@patternfly/react-component-groups)

| PF5 Name | PF6 Name | Prop Changes |
|---|---|---|
| `ContentHeader` | `PageHeader` | — |
| `ErrorState` | `ErrorState` | `errorTitle` → `titleText`, `errorDescription` → `bodyText` |
| `InvalidObject` | `MissingPage` | Renamed + prop changes |
| `NotAuthorized` | `NotAuthorized` | `title` → `titleText`, `description` → `bodyText` |

### MultiContentCard
- Removed `leftBorderVariant` and `withHeaderBorder`

### LogSnippet
- `leftBorderVariant` → `variant` (uses `AlertVariant` enum)

## Modal and DualListSelector

The "next" versions of Modal and DualListSelector have been promoted to be the default implementations. If you were using the old implementations, you need to migrate to the new API patterns. If you were already using the "next" versions, simply update your imports to remove the "/next" path.

## Common Migration Pitfalls

1. **Partial renames**: Component renamed in JSX but not in imports, or vice versa.
2. **Incomplete CSS variable updates**: Some `--pf-v5-` variables updated but others missed, especially in `.scss` files or inline styles.
3. **Legacy Table usage**: Using the old data-driven `Table` API which no longer exists. Must convert to composable `Table` pattern.
4. **EmptyState restructuring**: Forgetting to remove `EmptyStateHeader`/`EmptyStateIcon` wrapper components after moving content to props on `EmptyState`.
5. **Mixed dependency versions**: Some `@patternfly/*` packages at v5 and others at v6 — causes type conflicts and runtime errors.
6. **Deprecated import reliance**: Heavily using `@patternfly/react-core/deprecated` instead of migrating to the new equivalents.
7. **Spacer/alignment string literals**: Old spacer and alignment string values used in props that now expect different values.
8. **Charts import path**: Importing from `@patternfly/react-charts` instead of `@patternfly/react-charts/victory`.
9. **CSS specificity shifts**: PF6 changed some internal CSS specificity, so custom overrides that worked in PF5 may no longer apply correctly.
10. **Toolbar chip→label renames**: Many toolbar callback/content props were renamed from chip terminology to label terminology.
11. **Button icon children**: Icons passed as children to Button instead of via the `icon` prop.
12. **Breakpoint pixel assumptions**: Code that calculates breakpoints using pixel values will break since PF6 uses rem-based tokens.

## Correct vs Incorrect Migration Examples

### EmptyState — Incorrect (PF5 style)
```tsx
<EmptyState>
  <EmptyStateIcon icon={CubesIcon} />
  <EmptyStateHeader titleText="No results" headingLevel="h4" />
  <EmptyStateBody>No data available</EmptyStateBody>
</EmptyState>
```

### EmptyState — Correct (PF6 style)
```tsx
<EmptyState titleText="No results" headingLevel="h4" icon={CubesIcon}>
  <EmptyStateBody>No data available</EmptyStateBody>
</EmptyState>
```

### Text → Content — Incorrect (PF5 style)
```tsx
<TextContent>
  <Text component="h1">Title</Text>
  <Text component="p">Paragraph</Text>
</TextContent>
```

### Text → Content — Correct (PF6 style)
```tsx
<Content>
  <Content component="h1">Title</Content>
  <Content component="p">Paragraph</Content>
</Content>
```

### Charts — Incorrect (PF5 import)
```tsx
import { Chart } from '@patternfly/react-charts';
```

### Charts — Correct (PF6 import)
```tsx
import { Chart } from '@patternfly/react-charts/victory';
```

## Upgrade Tooling

PatternFly provides codemods to automate many changes:
```bash
npx @patternfly/pf-codemods@latest <path> --v6        # dry-run
npx @patternfly/pf-codemods@latest <path> --v6 --fix  # apply fixes
```

Additional codemods:
- **class-name-updater**: Renames `pf-v5-` CSS classes to `pf-v6-`
- **tokens-update**: Updates React tokens from old to new naming
- **css-vars-updater**: Updates CSS variables in `.css`, `.scss`, `.md` files
